title: Restaurant Manager
description:
Job Description:

  • Oversee the restaurant’s profit and loss performance and implement effective cost-control strategies.

  • Manage budgeting and forecasting activities to ensure financial targets set by management are achieved or surpassed.

  • Drive restaurant profitability by prioritizing revenue and guest count growth, while also ensuring cost management remains efficient.

  • Supervise and coordinate the restaurant’s day-to-day operations.

  • Regularly review and enhance overall restaurant performance through cost evaluations and process monitoring.

  • Ensure food safety and operational standards are consistently upheld to provide guests with a safe and pleasant dining environment.

  • Deliver prompt and professional customer service, addressing and resolving service issues tactfully to maintain high guest satisfaction.

  • Improve operational efficiency by providing strong leadership aligned with the company’s service culture, aiming to optimize the customer experience.

  • Manage labor costs through proper workforce scheduling and by monitoring staff attendance and leave.

  • Participate actively in recruitment by identifying and selecting suitable candidates for entry-level roles.

  • Take part in staff counseling and recommend appropriate disciplinary actions to management, including termination when necessary.

  • Lead, supervise, and develop a team of supervisors and service staff to ensure optimal use of assigned manpower.

  • Handle all administrative responsibilities related to restaurant operations.

  • Perform any additional tasks or duties assigned by the Area Manager as required.

Requirements:

  • Diploma in Hospitality Management or any related fields.

  • Minimum of 6 years management experience in Food & Beverage industry.

  • Excellent communication and presentation skills.

Interested applicants for the above advertised position(s), please kindly email an updated copy of your resume to: gs1@talenttradersg.com;


EA License No.: 13C6305

Registration No.: R23117856 CHOE KIN MUN


For candidate who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.
